---
title: 'Jewelry'
date: '2012-06-11T07:03:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8595407527388597472'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/jewelry.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'TCC Jewelry'
---

<div class="" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<h3>
   <div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal; text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" target="">Home</a><br />
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
</div>
</h3>
<h3>
Jewelry</h3>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="float: left; text-align: left;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/button-hole-earrings.html" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0348-a-f55ba1cacd0c.jpg" width="168" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Button Hole Earrings</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: right;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/candy-cane-earings.html" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0735-0f99351011a7.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Candy Cane Earrings</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<a href="http://draft.blogger.com/goog_1590481809"><span id="goog_1590481775"></span><span id="goog_1590481788"></span><span id="goog_1590481794"></span><span id="goog_1590481798"></span><span id="goog_1590481802"></span><span id="goog_1590481806"></span></a><span id="goog_1590481810"></span><span id="goog_1590481813"></span><span id="goog_1590481816"></span><span id="goog_1590481832"></span><span id="goog_1590481835"></span><span id="goog_1590481838"></span><br />
<span id="goog_1590481839"></span><span id="goog_1590481836"></span><span id="goog_1590481833"></span><span id="goog_1590481817"></span><span id="goog_1590481814"></span><span id="goog_1590481811"></span><span id="goog_1590481807"></span><span id="goog_1590481803"></span><span id="goog_1590481799"></span><span id="goog_1590481795"></span><span id="goog_1590481789"></span><span id="goog_1590481782"></span><span id="goog_1590481776"></span></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br />
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
Flavia Wolfe</div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: -webkit-auto;">
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe></div>
</div>
</div>
